---
title: "Eva System Performance Glossary"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(flextable)
library(stringr)
```

```{r table, message=F, warning=F}
# Version Updated 4/7/2026
gloss <- readxl::read_xlsx(path = gsub('sandbox', 'public-resources/system performance glossary.xlsx', getwd()))

gloss$Definition <- str_squish(gloss$Definition)
gloss$Definition <- str_replace_all(gloss$Definition,pattern='<br>', replacement = '\n\n')

flextable::set_flextable_defaults(
    font.family = "Roboto" 
  )
flextable(gloss) |>
  font(fontname = 'Roboto', part = 'header') |>
  bold(part = 'header') |>
  font(fontname = 'Roboto', part = 'body') |>
  border_inner() |>
  border_outer() |>
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") |>
  fit_to_width(max_width = 7.5)
```
